arts.ttl: Celtic exit ‘definitely’ right decision says player – Now missing the Celtic atmosphere though
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers handed Hyeon-gyu Oh only one league appearance in the second half of last season. The striker was frustrated with a lack of playing time and left Celtic Park for KRC Genk in the summer window. The former Celtic man’s situation hasn’t improved at Genk as he’s yet to make his first The post Celtic exit ‘definitely’ right decision says player – Now missing the Celtic atmosphere though appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Alexandro Bernabei's Internacional teammate shares what he's told the Celtic defender about his Parkhead future
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei’s Celtic future is still up in the air following an excellent loan spell at Internacional that has helped showcase his talent. Per Mails port, Internacional goalkeeper Sergio Rochet has spoken about what the future could hold for Bernabei following his successful loan spell, putting across a simple message to his teammate to focus on the remainder of his time in Brazil.

arts.ttl: Former Celtic starlet hit best stat in all four English leagues last month
arts.sum: A former Celtic prospect recorded the highest numbers of one particular stat in all four English leagues last month

arts.ttl: Daniel Cummings Celtic contract delay sparks EPL transfer red alert with Hoops future in limbo
arts.sum: Cummings has been in sensational form for Celtic's academy side this season - but is yet to be offered a new deal at Parkhead

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan's classy gesture in week of big Aberdeen vs Celtic clash
arts.sum: McCowan won a West of Scotland title with East End United before he left the club in 2017 to join Ayr United where he made 78 appearances scoring 19 goals and creating 12 assists before moving to Dundee four years later. As Celtic prepare to take on Aberdeen in the Scottish Premiership top-of-the-table clash, McCowan took time out of his busy schedule to pop in for a visit to East End Boys club in Greenock where the Hoops midfielder started his career.

arts.ttl: Henrik last signature before Lyon leg break – unluckiest Celtic autograph book ever?
arts.sum: On October 21, 1999, Celtic lost 1-0 to Lyon in France during the first leg of a UEFA Cup Round Two encounter. The defeat was disappointing in isolation, but it was also the night Henrik Larsson suffered a brutal season-ending leg break.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich's Manuel Neuer given first EVER red card in 866-game career after crashing into former Celtic star
arts.sum: The World Cup winner was given his marching orders as the Bavarians were knocked out of the German Cup by Xabi Alonso's Bayer Leverkusen

arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin refusing to let semi-final play into thinking as Aberdeen and Celtic prepare for battle
arts.sum: Aberdeen boss Jimmy Thelin has spoken ahead of his side’s home clash against Celtic in the Scottish Premiership this evening. Following a run of one win in five matches, Aberdeen know that Celtic could extend the gap at the top to seven points should another victory be forthcoming.

arts.ttl: What James Forrest told reporters about finishing his career at Celtic
arts.sum: “When I get older, I have realised, especially the last couple of years when you are in the Celtic bubble and winning league titles, playing in the Champions League, then I don’t think there is much better. “I never really thought about it,” said Forrest about ending his career at Celtic.

arts.ttl: Celtic Predicted XI vs Aberdeen as Brendan Rodgers has to mull over stick or twist scenarios
arts.sum: Your predicted XI in full is: Schmeichel, Johnston, Carter-Vickers, Trusty, Valle, McGregor, Bernardo, McCowan, Kuhn, Maeda, Kyogo. Post-match, Rodgers admitted he doesn’t have defined Celtic starters and backs the majority of his squad to come in and deliver no matter the occasion.
